title: Port
description:
Features:
- Port Monitoring: Lists all active TCP and UDP connections (IPv4 and IPv6).
- Intelligent Polling: Automatically refreshes when visible and pauses when hidden to reduce resource usage.
- Process Correlation: Maps each connection to its owning process, including name and file path.
- Hybrid Search: Supports fuzzy search for process names and precise matching for IP addresses and ports.
- Customizable Filters: Configure which fields are included in search (Process Name, Local/Remote Address, Local/Remote Port).
